title: Warehouse Line-Free Shelf Activation (Weighted Cap Set in F_3^n)
strategies: trivial: emit the binary sub-cube {0,1}^n (the checker's baseline) -> ~0.10
greedy: weight-descending greedy over a restricted shelf pool (drop the top slab of one coordinate)
strong: max over several deterministic weight-greedy runs (full space + each coordinate-slab restriction)
